feed.title: BORIS is an easy-to-use event logging software for video/audio coding and live observations.

entry.title: 2026-04-13: Release of version 9.10
entry.content: The version 9.10 is available. Added a plugin for behavior latency.
entry.summary: The version 9.10 is available. Added a plugin for behavior latency.

entry.title: 2026-04-28: Release of version 9.10.1
entry.content: The version 9.10.1 is available. Fixed bug in previous/next media function
entry.summary: The version 9.10.1 is available. Fixed bug in previous/next media function

entry.title: 2026-06-09: Release of version 9.11.0
entry.content: The version 9.11.0 is available. Plugins can be downloaded from the official GitHub repo: https://github.com/olivierfriard/BORIS_plugins
entry.summary: The version 9.11.0 is available. Plugins can be downloaded from the official GitHub repo: https://github.com/olivierfriard/BORIS_plugins

entry.title: 2026-06-26: Release of version 9.12.1
entry.content: The version 9.12.1 is available. Introduced version control in plugins
entry.summary: The version 9.12.1 is available. Introduced version control in plugins

entry.title: 2026-06-26: Release of version 9.12.3
entry.content: The version 9.12.3 is available. Fixed various bugs
entry.summary: The version 9.12.3 is available. Fixed various bugs
